hub.qualitycheck_desc.tr: AI-powered समीक्षा का आपका ABC entries के साथ विशिष्ट improvement suggestions

hub.quick_launch_hint.tr: Core clinical उपकरण — one tap पहुंच

hub.restorative_desc.tr: step-by-step scripts के लिए harm repair, समुदाय वृत्त, और reintegration conferences

hub.scdmanager_desc.tr: AB, ABAB, कई Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion

hub.selfcheck_desc.tr: student-facing mood जाँच-में और reflection journal — capturing उनका आवाज़

hub.sessionnotes_desc.tr: Timestamped अवलोकन नोट्स के साथ आवाज़ dictation — capture संदर्भ as it happens

hub.sessiontracker_desc.tr: systematic सत्र-आधारित behavioral measurement के साथ rate calculation

hub.socialvalidity_desc.tr: TARF और IRP-15 scales के लिए measuring treatment acceptability — आवश्यक के लिए publication

hub.teamnotes_desc.en: Multi-role timestamped collaboration thread for teachers, paras, counselors, and parents
hub.teamnotes_desc.tr: Multi-role timestamped सहयोग thread के लिए शिक्षक, paras, counselors, और अभिभावक

hub.treatintegrity_desc.en: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
hub.treatintegrity_desc.tr: दस्तावेज़ whether हस्तक्षेप हैं implemented as designed — घटक-स्तर fidelity ट्रैकिंग

hub.cantdowontdo_desc.tr: क्रमबद्ध करें कौशल vs. performance deficits को pick सही समर्थन.

hub.competingpathways_desc.tr: Map desired और replacement व्यवहार against problem path.

hub.mipractice_desc.tr: Rehearse MI conversations के साथ अनुकरण किया गया छात्र responses.

hub.practicum_desc.en: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
hub.practicum_desc.tr: चलाएं एक guided अभ्यास करें case से शुरू करें को finish.

overview.empty_desc.en: Start collecting ABC data or run live observations to see trends here.
overview.empty_desc.tr: शुरू करें collecting ABC डेटा या चलाएं लाइव अवलोकन को देखें trends here.

hotspot.tap_hint.en: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
hotspot.tap_hint.tr: Tap एक सेल को increment. क्लिक करें routine name को संपादित करें.

quick_fill_hint.en: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
quick_fill_hint.tr: AI होगा parse आपका description में fields below. आप सकता है फिर संपादित करें मैनुअल रूप से.

quiz_fba_purpose.en: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
quiz_fba_purpose.tr: क्या है primary purpose का एक FBA?

quick_fill_placeholder.en: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
quick_fill_placeholder.tr: e.g. "छात्र threw paper के दौरान गणित जब asked को दिखाएं काम, शिक्षक redirected calmly"

reinforce_step_1.en: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_1.tr: शुरू करें के साथ dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 या FR-2)

reinforce_step_2.en: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_2.tr: Once व्यवहार है consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2

reinforce_step_3.en: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_3.tr: स्थानांतरित करें को चर schedule (VR) के लिए अधिक natural maintenance

reinforce_step_4.en: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
reinforce_step_4.tr: Gradually increase VR मान (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)

fidelity_tip_1.tr: समीक्षा implementation procedures के साथ staff

quiz_opt_any_stops.en: Any behavior that stops the problem
quiz_opt_any_stops.tr: कोई भी व्यवहार वह stops problem

ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.en: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.tr: एक break? सहायता? Someone को सुनें? Space?

ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.en: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.tr: जोड़ें संदर्भ, constraints, या विशिष्ट चुनौती... e.g., " छात्र also has एक speech delay" या "यह है एक middle school छात्र"

ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.en: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.tr: कोई भी अन्य विवरण (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...

ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.en: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.tr: Describe छात्र persona... e.g., "आप हैं एक 3rd grader who becomes anxious के दौरान गणित और tends को cry और shut down..."

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: e.g. "Does एक token economy reduce off-task व्यवहार के दौरान गणित निर्देश?"

ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.en: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.tr: e.g., "छात्र है defiant और refuses को follow directions."

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: e.g. "छात्र के साथ autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "नया को school"

ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.en: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.tr: दर्ज करें behavioral लक्ष्य को scale (e.g., "छात्र होगा remain में seat के दौरान independent काम के लिए 15 minutes")

ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.en:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.tr:
Reflect पर आपका approach...
• क्या worked well?
• क्या would आप do differently?
• क्या रणनीतियां do आप चाहते को अभ्यास करें अगला?

ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.en: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.tr: साझा करें क्या आप notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural संदर्भ, या suggestions के लिए school team...

ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.en: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.tr: प्रकार आपका प्रतिक्रिया here. Be thorough और उपयोग करें professional भाषा...

ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.en: What could you or a grown-up do differently?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.tr: क्या could आप या एक grown-up do differently?

ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.en: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.tr: क्या made आप feel यह way? (वैकल्पिक)

ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.en: What was going on before you felt this way?
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.tr: क्या was going पर पहले आप felt यह way?

toast.mastered_n_n_consecutive_sessions_.tr: 🎉 MASTERED! N — N consecutive सत्र at criterion!
